Temple Tours

At a Glance: Navagraha Temple Tour (1 Day or 2 Days)

Best For: Pilgrims & Heritage Lovers
Pickup: Anywhere in Chennai
Safety: Verified Drivers & Sanitized Cars
Booking: Instant via WhatsApp

Navagraha Temple Tour (1 Day or 2 Days)

A complete spiritual journey covering the nine planetary temples (Navagrahas) around Kumbakonam. This trip is designed to help you complete your pariharams and prayers with peace of mind.

Route Plan

1

Chennai

Departure to Kumbakonam

2

Kumbakonam

Base Camp for Navagraha Temples

3

Suryanar & Thingaloor

Sun & Moon Temples

4

Vaitheeswaran & Thirunallar

Mars & Saturn Temples

5

Alangudi & Others

Guru & Remaining Temples

Total Cost includes: 650km (approx round trip) + 2 Days Bata + Toll Estimates.

What's Included

  • Experienced driver familiar with temple routes
  • Clean & AC vehicle
  • Parking & Toll assistance

Travel Guide & Tips

History & Significance

The Navagraha temples are a cluster of 9 temples dedicated to the nine planetary deities. They are located around Kumbakonam and Thanjavur.

Darshan Timings

Varies by temple, generally 6 AM – 12 PM & 4 PM – 8 PM.

Dress Code

Traditional wear recommended.

Pro Tips for First-Timers

  • It is difficult to cover all 9 temples in one day. A 2-day trip is recommended.
  • Start early (5 AM) if attempting a 1-day trip.
  • Alangudi (Guru) and Thirunallar (Sani) are the most crowded.
  • Hire a local guide for optimal route planning.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Can we cover all 9 temples in 1 day?

It is very tight. We recommend 2 days for a relaxed darshan.

Q: Where does the trip start?

Pickup from Chennai or Kumbakonam railway station.
